top_signals.title: ECB Consumer Expectations Survey results – April 2026
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Goldman Says Hedge Funds Buy Stocks at Fastest Pace in 6 Months
top_signals.summary: Hedge funds purchased US equities at the fastest pace in six months last week, as the S&P 500 Index extended its historic winning streak, according to Goldman Sachs Group Inc.’s prime brokerage desk.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: More African Nations Seen Reaching Investment Grade, AfDB Says
top_signals.summary: More African countries are likely to regain or achieve investment-grade credit ratings by next year as reforms begin to deliver results and economic growth accelerates, African Development Bank President Sidi Ould Tah said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Berkshire Hathaway to Buy Taylor Morrison for $6.8 Billion
top_signals.summary: Berkshire Hathaway Inc. will acquire Taylor Morrison Home Corp. in an all-cash deal worth about $6.8 billion, the first major purchase under chief executive Greg Abel and a vote of confidence in the US housing market.

top_signals.title: Aave overhauls listing standards after $230 million rsETH exploit exposed bridge risks
Sushi chain in Japan may consult police over video of man pouring liquid on sushi
top_signals.summary: The video, posted on TikTok on Wednesday, seems to show the uploader pouring liquid from a dish soap bottle onto sushi that had been delivered to him via a conveyor belt.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: New CIFSwitch Linux flaw gives root on multiple distributions
top_signals.summary: A newly discovered local privilege escalation vulnerability dubbed 'CIFSwitch' in the Linux kernel could allow attackers to forge CIFS authentication key descriptions, abuse the kernel's key request mechanism, and gain root privileges. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Wu-Tang Clan’s final tour stop highlights enduring Asian influences
top_signals.summary: Wu-Tang Clan built its mythology on martial arts films and Asian iconography — and Yokohama finally got to witness that legacy live on the group's farewell tour.
